title: Syndication & Raising Capital
subtitle: Scale past your own checkbook with passive investor capital
description: Once you've done a few deals on your own, the next step is raising outside capital. This course covers Reg D 506(b) vs 506(c), the LP/GP structure, waterfalls and promote, PPM drafting, investor relations, and the fiduciary duties that come with holding other people's money.
outcomes: Understand the difference between Reg D 506(b) and 506(c) offerings
Structure a limited partnership with sponsor/GP promote
Build a waterfall with preferred return, catch-up, and tiers
Understand what goes in a PPM, operating agreement, and subscription agreement
Build an investor pipeline and raise your first $1M deal
